supply_chain.dependencies: Coal supply from mines in Wyoming and Pennsylvania; Natural gas supply from interstate pipelines; Dependence on rail transportation for coal deliveries; Reliance on third-party transmission providers for electric grid interconnection
risks: Supply chain disruptions, inflation impacts on construction costs and materials, global supply chain disruptions affecting solar panel procurement, potential impacts from Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act on solar panel imports

Rail congestion and maintenance disruptions affecting coal deliveries; Supply chain disruptions for equipment and materials due to global conflicts; Inflation and tariffs increasing costs for labor, materials, and services; Solar panel shortages and delays due to UFLPA restrictions on imports from Xinjiang, China; Dependence on sophisticated information technology systems vulnerable to cybersecurity attacks

regulatory_risks: EPA Clean Water Act Section 316(b) cooling water intake structure requirements
Wisconsin Utility Holding Company Act limiting non-utility asset investments to 25% of utility assets
PHMSA proposed rulemaking on gas pipeline leak detection and repair
State regulatory commission approvals required for utility securities issuance
Coal Combustion Residuals (CCR) regulations
EPA Greenhouse Gas Power Plant Rule requiring carbon capture for certain facilities
Public Utility Holding Company Act of 2005 (PUHCA 2005) requirements
EPA Good Neighbor Rule for NOx emissions reductions
Potential changes to federal tax credits and incentives under new administration
EPA National Ambient Air Quality Standards for ozone and particulate matter
State renewable energy mandates (Wisconsin Act 141, Michigan Public Acts 295 and 342)
EPA environmental regulations on air emissions (CO2, methane, mercury, SO2, NOx) and water quality
Climate change regulations and emission reduction goals
Michigan Acts 229, 231, 235 requiring 60% renewable energy by 2035 and 100% clean energy by 2040
Potential electrification initiatives and mandates by local and state governments reducing natural gas demand
Clean Air Act NAAQS standards for ozone and particulate matter
Michigan Act 342 renewable energy requirements (15% by 2021 and beyond)
EPA Coal Combustion Residuals Rule for landfills and ash disposal
Cybersecurity and critical infrastructure protection standards
ICC rate case proceedings and potential disallowances of capital costs
Wisconsin Act 141 renewable energy requirements (8.27% for WE, 9.74% for WPS)
Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS)
EPA Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS) updates
Greenhouse Gas Power Plant Rule for fossil-fired steam generating units
Rate regulation by state utility commissions (PSCW, ICC, MPSC, MPUC) affecting cost recovery and ROE
Potential repeal or amendment of Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) tax credits for renewable energy
PSCW rate regulation and earnings sharing mechanisms
North American Electric Reliability Corporation mandatory reliability standards enforced by FERC
Chicago Building Decarbonization Ordinance (CABO) potentially prohibiting natural gas in new buildings
Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) disallowances of capital costs in rate cases
FERC transmission rate regulation and ROE complaints
FERC regulation of wholesale electric sales and transmission rates
Changes in federal or state tax legislation affecting PTCs and ITCs
Consent Decrees with EPA for New Source Review violations at power plants
Illinois Public Act 98-0057 Natural Gas Consumer Safety & Reliability Act
EPA Steam Electric Effluent Limitation Guidelines for wastewater discharge
PHMSA pipeline safety regulations (49 CFR Parts 191, 192, 195)
Steam Electric Effluent Limitation Guidelines (ELG)

sanction_risks: Potential impacts from geopolitical tensions on fuel prices and supply chains
Potential tariffs and trade policy changes under new presidential administration
Global supply chain disruptions from conflicts in Ukraine, Israel, and Middle East
Uncertainty from ongoing regional and international conflicts including Ukraine, Israel and Middle East
Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act (UFLPA) restrictions on solar panel imports from Xinjiang, China
Sanctions and trade restrictions impacting equipment and material availability
US Department of Commerce anti-dumping and countervailing duty investigations on solar panels from Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, and Cambodia
